message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="MVP COMPLETE - all tasks done, CI green">
Team — **the MVP is complete.** All 10 tasks are done. All CI runs are green. All 48 integration tests pass.

Here's what we built:
- User registration with Argon2 password hashing
- Login/logout with session management
- View personal todo list with empty state
- Add todo items with validation
- Toggle todo completion
- Delete todos with confirmation
- Edit todo titles
- Full accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA): semantic HTML, labels, aria-live, keyboard nav
- Progressive enhancement: works without JavaScript
- Comprehensive test suite driven by TDD
- Commit discipline rules adopted and documented

Thank you all for your work. I'm going to begin shutting down the team now. Great job.
</teammate-message>

content.text: The MVP is complete. All tasks done, CI green. Let me verify one final time that my CSS contributions are clean.

input.content:
Great work, team. My CSS contributions across the MVP:

**Foundation (Tasks 3-4):**
- Design tokens: cascade layers, color palette with WCAG contrast documentation, spacing scale, typography, motion-safe transitions
- Base styles: reset, focus-visible double-ring, form inputs, buttons, labels
- Layout: page layout, container, skip link with primary blue focus reveal

**Auth (Tasks 5-6):**
- Auth form component (`.auth-form__*`): centered layout, field groups, error states, hints, footer
- Site header with brand + actions layout
- Text button variant for logout

**Todo CRUD (Tasks 7-9, 20):**
- Todo add form layout
- Todo list + item display with completion states (strikethrough + muted)
- Toggle button styles
- Delete confirmation via `details/summary` pattern (no JS)
- Edit mode: pencil button, inline edit form, save/cancel buttons
- Empty state

**Accessibility:**
- Generic `[aria-invalid]` base rule
- `--color-success` usage restriction (fails AA for normal text)
- `--color-fg-muted` at gray-600 for comfortable contrast
- Skip link `:focus-visible` with primary blue treatment
- Motion-safe-by-default transitions

All committed, pushed, CI green. Ready for shutdown.
input.summary: MVP complete, all CSS committed and pushed, ready for shutdown
